item.name: Tales of Adventure: One Summoner's Journey III
item.description:
A detailed record of one adventurer's continuing path to becoming a realm-renowned summoner─so detailed, in fact, that all who read it come to swear they experienced the events firsthand.

Use to instantly level summoner to 80 and complete all job quests up through “To Be Second Best.” Cannot be used outside large settlements. Automatic logout will commence upon usage.
